title: Change Request Filed Event
description: Emitted by an agent when it files a Change Request (Spec Issue / SI) against a canonical artifact — the EHBG §12 escalation path. A CR routed to the Spec Corpus Agent is reviewed (Codex pre-approval) before the ratifier sees it; a CR flagged requires_ratifier proceeds to a Promotion Ledger ceremony. Agents may file CRs; only the ratifier may approve them (ratification_decision).

target_artifact.description: Canonical artifact / spec file the CR proposes changing

proposed_change.description: Concrete proposed edit / row shape / schema delta

requires_ratifier.description: True when the change touches a canonical contract surface requiring a Promotion Ledger ceremony (Evans + Engineering Lead + CDM owner)

is_architectural_judgment.description: True when this CR originates from a hard-floor item 6 STOP-and-escalate (net-new architecture/schema/invariant)

escalation_artifact.description: Path to the Engineering Review Request / Decision Memo, when requires_ratifier
